3061340.name: All On Board! - Escape the Dark Castle
3061340.description:
Get this DLC to host Escape The Dark Castle sessions in All On Board!

All players need All On Board! to participate, but only the host must own this DLC, letting others join without having to buy it.

1-4 Players | 20-45 mins

Recommended Age: 14+

Dare to Escape the Dark Castle in a desperate bid for freedom, now adapted for VR in All On Board!

This atmospheric cooperative game casts you as prisoners wrongly locked in the depths of the castle. Only by working together will you stand a chance of survival.

Choose from a range of prisoners, each with unique stats and abilities, and join forces in your fight for freedom. Use each prisoner’s die wisely and make the most of your items to overcome the horrors that await within.

Face deadly traps and merciless enemies as a team. Decide together the turn order and who will reveal the next chapter card, knowing that they must face its consequences. Every decision could be the difference between life and death.

Key Features:

- Retro cooperative adventure with a unique atmosphere

- Prisoners with their own die: combine abilities and rely on teamwork to survive

- Strategic group decisions

- Includes a themed scenario and original soundtrack

- In addition to multiplayer, can also be adapted for solo play with the help of the wiki

- Available in EFIGS (English, French, Italian, German and Spanish)

- Quick to learn with rulebook and video tutorial

Will you escape the Dark Castle, or be consumed by its horrors?
3061340.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 法语, 意大利语, 德语
